candidates.notes: FM1 spectral diagnosis strongly supported (65,801x concentration ratio). Task-type boundary discovery is robust. FM2 evaluation requires fundamentally new approach (rank-invariance barrier). PCA-whitened attribution is a major positive on toxicity (+30pp, needs validation). Retrieval baselines must be addressed honestly. Paper has strong Tier 1 contributions: FM1 diagnosis, task-type boundary, systematic benchmark. Gate 4 (PCA whitening) PASSES, partially rescuing the matched filter theory for behavioral tasks.
